snippets.title: GkeHub listMemberships Sample
snippets.description: Lists Memberships in a given project and location.

snippets.title: GkeHub listBoundMemberships Sample
snippets.description: Lists Memberships bound to a Scope. The response includes relevant Memberships from all regions.

snippets.title: GkeHub listFeatures Sample
snippets.description: Lists Features in a given project and location.

snippets.title: GkeHub getMembership Sample
snippets.description: Gets the details of a Membership.

snippets.title: GkeHub getFeature Sample
snippets.description: Gets details of a single Feature.

snippets.title: GkeHub createMembership Sample
snippets.description: Creates a new Membership. **This is currently only supported for GKE clusters on Google Cloud**. To register other clusters, follow the instructions at https://cloud.google.com/anthos/multicluster-management/connect/registering-a-cluster.

snippets.title: GkeHub deleteMembership Sample
snippets.description: Removes a Membership. **This is currently only supported for GKE clusters on Google Cloud**. To unregister other clusters, follow the instructions at https://cloud.google.com/anthos/multicluster-management/connect/unregistering-a-cluster.

snippets.title: GkeHub generateConnectManifest Sample
snippets.description: Generates the manifest for deployment of the GKE connect agent. **This method is used internally by Google-provided libraries.** Most clients should not need to call this method directly.

snippets.title: GkeHub getFleet Sample
snippets.description: Returns the details of a fleet.

snippets.title: GkeHub deleteFleet Sample
snippets.description: Removes a Fleet. There must be no memberships remaining in the Fleet.

snippets.title: GkeHub listFleets Sample
snippets.description: Returns all fleets within an organization or a project that the caller has access to.

snippets.title: GkeHub getScopeNamespace Sample
snippets.description: Returns the details of a fleet namespace.

snippets.title: GkeHub getScopeRBACRoleBinding Sample
snippets.description: Returns the details of a Scope RBACRoleBinding.

snippets.title: GkeHub getScope Sample
snippets.description: Returns the details of a Scope.

snippets.title: GkeHub getMembershipBinding Sample
snippets.description: Returns the details of a MembershipBinding.

snippets.title: GkeHub getMembershipRBACRoleBinding Sample
snippets.description: Returns the details of a Membership RBACRoleBinding.

snippets.title: GkeHub generateMembershipRBACRoleBindingYAML Sample
snippets.description: Generates a YAML of the  RBAC policies for the specified RoleBinding and its associated impersonation resources.
